spec_match.rationale: Uses requestWindow({ copyStyleSheets }) and compares computed styles for regular link/style CSS against a constructed CSSStyleSheet installed with document.adoptedStyleSheets.

interactive.rationale: The checkbox and open/close controls launch real PiP windows and update host/PiP style-copy probe readouts.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede now frames the regular stylesheet copy path and the adoptedStyleSheets comparison the page actually performs.

edge_cases.rationale: Constructed stylesheet behavior and late-added opener stylesheet propagation are both probed against the existing PiP window.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables used; popout content visibly inherits design system tokens.

summary: MCP Chrome 148.0.0.0 on macOS loaded http://localhost:3000/v131/document-picture-in-picture-copy-document-mode/docpip-copy/, observed the host constructed CSSStyleSheet marker, opened PiP with copyStyleSheets checked, unchecked the box, and opened PiP again. The readout reported regular link/style copied=false and adopted CSSStyleSheet copied=false for both paths in this browser, so the unsupported native copy behavior is surfaced rather than claimed as passing. The late stylesheet probe injected a new opener style after the PiP was open and compared host versus PiP marker styles, surfacing whether post-open propagation occurred. Console was clean and network requests were 200/204.
